_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: the number of immature (round or elongated) spermatids was significantly increased in Nf1+/- mice compared to Nf1 control (p = 0.03)
details: Number of round and elongated spermatids significantly increased in Nf1+/- mice (0.56 ± 0.008) compared to controls (0.51 ± 0.02), p = 0.03
